title: order_event
description: Tracks an order's lifecycle through the fulfillment center.

order_id.description: Unique order identifier. Used as the idempotency key for deduplication downstream.

event_type.description: Lifecycle stage of the order at the time this event was emitted.

warehouse_zone.description: Fulfillment center zone that produced this event, e.g. zone_a, zone_b.

timestamp.description: Event time (ISO 8601, UTC). When the event actually happened in the real world, not when it was published to Pub/Sub.

items_count.description: Number of items in the order at this stage.
